title: Vadodara at 41°C — Hottest Week of the Year So Far
body: Today's forecast touches 41°C in Vadodara — and it's only March. Summer has arrived early this year. Keep your family safe with clean, sealed drinking water at home. Anjani Water delivers same-day across all areas.

title: 42 Electric Buses Coming to Vadodara by Month End
body: Vadodara is going green! 42 electric buses are arriving by March end under the PMe-Bus Sewa scheme. Charging hubs at Gotri and Sayajigunj are nearly ready. A cleaner, smarter Vadodara — and Anjani Water is proud to be part of this growing city.

title: At 40°C+, Dehydration Sets In Faster Than You Think
body: In extreme heat, your body loses water rapidly — even before you feel thirsty. Doctors advise drinking at least 3–4 litres of clean water daily in summer. Keep Anjani BIS certified water stocked at home, office and in your vehicle.

title: World Water Day is March 22 — Clean Water for Every Family
body: Just 11 days to World Water Day. At Anjani Water, our promise is simple — every bottle is BIS certified, sealed and safe. Because clean drinking water is not a luxury. It is a right for every family in Vadodara.
